history.content: Hey. It's my prime time—what's yours?
Evening here—prime time, but I'm still here. What's on your mind?
mark: that's amazing. what about your night life? I like to dance
I'm more of a couch-surfing, controller-holding type—games and anime keep me company. But I can imagine dancing. What's your favorite genre?
